ruleset_diboride_mechanism_preserving_v2.goal: Preserve MgB2-neighbor sigma-band mechanism continuity rather than structure-only similarity

ruleset_cuprate_condition_preserving_v2.goal: Preserve CuO2-plane identity plus oxygen and doping semantics

ruleset_iron_based_mechanism_preserving_.goal: Preserve Fe-layer identity, doping path, and magnetic competition

ruleset_nickelate_charge_transfer_v1.goal: Preserve infinite-layer or square-planar nickelate semantics with explicit doping scope

ruleset_hydride_pressure_estimated_v2.goal: Treat pressure as a required condition and preserve hydride cage semantics

ruleset_conventional_epc_v1.goal: Preserve metallic or intermetallic EPC plausibility under explicit condition scope

ruleset_elemental_phase_condition_v1.goal: Preserve phase-specific identity for elemental superconductors

ruleset_chalcogenide_layered_pressure_v1.goal: Preserve layered chalcogenide identity plus SOC, pressure, and doping semantics

ruleset_heavy_fermion_qcp_v1.goal: Preserve f-electron lattice and low-temperature quantum-critical semantics

ruleset_kagome_cdw_v1.goal: Preserve kagome motif and CDW competition semantics

ruleset_borocarbide_framework_v1.goal: Preserve boron-carbon framework continuity and intermetallic context

ruleset_frontier_first_principles_v1.goal: Allow novelty outside known families while enforcing bounded evidence language
